user.title: Add irrigation zone
user.description: Configure one irrigation zone. Add the integration again for each additional zone.

data.name: Zone name
data.et0_sensor: ET0 sensor (daily net ET in mm)
ET0 sensor (daily net ET in mm)

calculate.name: Calculate
calculate.description: Recompute the targeted zone(s): apply the daily net-ET0 depletion (once per calendar day) and update the irrigation duration.

set_bucket.name: Set bucket
set_bucket.description: Set the soil-moisture bucket (mm) for the targeted zone(s).

reset_bucket.name: Reset bucket
reset_bucket.description: Reset the bucket to 0 mm for the targeted zone(s).
